form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after 13 months 4th in a small field at this track on March 29 over 914m, 1.75 len behind The Great G carrying 57kg at $4.70. Previously second-up ran last in a small field at this track on January 12 2025 over 914m, 13 len behind In Suspense carrying 56kg at $55.60. Among the top chances.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. At the latest run 2nd in a small field at this track on March 22 over 914m, 2.25 len behind Summer Haze with 57kg at $4.30. Before that settled back and ran on when 4th of 7 at this track on February 21 over 914m, 3 len behind Silvercross with 57kg at $15.80. Making headway. Likely to measure up again.

form.formComment: At the latest run got back early in a small field at Santa Anita on March 21 over 1609m, 15 len behind Redial carrying 53.5kg at $31.70. form.formComment: Had two starts to date. At long odds at debut, ran last of 7 at this track on January 25 over 914m, 14 len behind Gentleman Rancher with 56kg at $49.80. Last start ran last of 7 at this track on February 15 over 914m, 12 len behind Voucher carrying 57kg at $48.30. Happy to risk in this.
